services.title: Interior Painting
services.body: Whole-home or room-by-room repaints with premium grades, furniture and floor protection, and spotless cleanup every night — so you can live comfortably between coats in Lake Nona and Orlando homes.

services.title: Cabinet Painting
services.body: Factory-smooth finishes, color guidance, and hardware updates that make dated cabinets feel brand new.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.body: Driveways, pavers, siding, and outdoor surfaces cleaned and sealed so your home looks fresh before you paint.

services.title: Fence & Deck Staining
services.body: Even coverage over imperfect boards with neighbor-friendly prep and a polished final finish.

services.title: Stucco & Touch-Ups
services.body: Crack repair and listing-ready touch-ups so your home shows beautifully inside and out before market day.

services.title: Free Color Consultation
services.body: Not sure which shade works with your Florida light? We bring samples, walk your rooms, and help you pick confidently — complimentary with every quote.

services.title: Whole-Room Refresh
services.body: One coordinated update — paint, patch, and polish — so a tired bedroom or office feels new again without months of contractor chaos.

services.title: Drywall & Texture Repair
services.body: Smooth patches, matched orange-peel texture, and nail-pop fixes so your walls are camera-ready before the first coat of paint.

services.title: Roof & Soft Wash
services.body: Gentle algae and mildew removal for roofs, siding, and lanai screens — restore Central Florida curb appeal without harsh pressure damage.

services.title: Paver Sealing
services.body: Clean, sand, and seal driveway pavers so they resist sun fade and rain washout — a polished entry that lasts season after season.

services.title: Pre-Listing Makeover
services.body: Listing-ready touch-ups inside and out — scuff fixes, fresh trim, and curb appeal boosts so buyers fall in love at the front door.

services.title: Water Damage Repair
services.body: Patch, prime, and repaint after leaks or storm infiltration — organized crews that get your home back to normal fast with minimal disruption.

services.title: Popcorn Ceiling Removal
services.body: Modern smooth ceilings that brighten rooms, reduce dust traps, and add resale appeal — especially popular before a fresh interior repaint.

testimonials.name: Larry Truong
testimonials.quote: Mauricio and the Pixel Paint team did a fantastic job with a full cleaning and exterior painting of my home as well as pressure washing, sanding and sealing pavers. He provided regular updates, and I appreciated him taking care of smaller items during the process.

testimonials.name: Irene Montanaro
testimonials.quote: He was able to paint and refinish our tile making it appear much more modern. He also stripped two layers of old wallpaper, textured the wall and painted it. The entire process was very professional and the work area was kept clean.

testimonials.name: Jennifer Fitzgerald
testimonials.quote: Mauricio and his team at Pixel Paint completely transformed what was a very brown dull kitchen into something I am so excited to host friends and family in! Process was smooth and quick from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Justin Q
testimonials.quote: Pixel Paint is one of the few companies that doesn't forget you even after the job is done. When we had an issue years later, Mauricio replied within minutes that he'd take care of us. They live up to their word.

testimonials.name: Eric Whitten
testimonials.quote: We used Mauricio and his team to renovate our kitchen, including painting cabinets, new countertops, new backsplash, and new lighting. Responsive, easy to work with, and a great overall value.

testimonials.name: Kristina Herndon
testimonials.quote: We had them do a full interior paint job of our house — it looks great! The crew was friendly, professional, and quiet as a mouse while they worked. We highly recommend their services.

testimonials.name: Josie Kassem
testimonials.quote: Pixel Paint Renovations did an outstanding job providing us with information about different types of paint and painting our house professionally. Their warranty is second to none.

testimonials.name: Pamela Bolingbroke
testimonials.quote: I managed a paint manufacturing company for 15 years and typically painted my homes myself. I feel qualified to give Pixel Paint Renovations a five star rating for workmanship and materials.

testimonials.name: Michelle Ospina
testimonials.quote: Highly recommend. They are very responsive and solution-oriented. All workers are background checked and the project manager is regularly on site overseeing all work.

testimonials.name: Luis D
testimonials.quote: From the very beginning Mauricio was great in explaining everything and going over color options. Jonathan and John did a phenomenal job painting and were great at keeping the site as clean as possible.

testimonials.name: Kristi House
testimonials.quote: We had a great experience with Mauricio and his team. They are professional, detailed and easy to work with. Highly recommend!

sections.title: Local team. Real accountability.
sections.body: Pixel Paint and Renovations Inc grew through referrals across Lake Nona, Laureate Park, and the greater Orlando area — not ads. Our team stays on your project from the first walkthrough to the final walkthrough, with crews who treat your home like their own.

sections.title: Built for Florida homes
sections.body: Humidity, stucco cracks, harsh sun, and HOA timelines are part of the job here. We choose paint grades, sealers, and prep steps that hold up in Central Florida — whether you are refreshing one room or coordinating a kitchen update before listing.

servicesPage.title: Services | Pixel Paint Renovations
servicesPage.description: Book Lake Nona paint and renovation — interiors, kitchens, baths, stucco prep — without contractor chaos: written quotes, the same crew and PM from walkthrough to finish, and warranty-backed craftsmanship across Orlando and Central Florida.

hero.eyebrow: Lake Nona & Orlando · Referral-backed paint & renovation
hero.headline: The crew who quotes your home is the crew who paints it.
hero.lead: Tell us what you want refreshed — interior and exterior paint, cabinets and trim, a kitchen or bath update, stucco repair, or listing prep. We walk the home, send a written quote with a clear start date, and schedule the same background-checked team — one project manager from first visit to final walkthrough.
hero.body: Pixel Paint and Renovations grew through Lake Nona neighbor referrals because we skip the usual contractor headaches: no surprise subs, no vague allowances, protected job sites every day, and a PM you can still reach after final payment. For Orlando homes, that means humidity-smart prep on stucco and wood, floors covered and rooms usable between coats, and a posted schedule you can plan around — not a chain of stranger handoffs. Warranty included with every quote.

sections.title: Interior painting without the mess
sections.body: Whole-home repaints, accent walls, ceiling refreshes, and cabinet-adjacent trim with floors covered, furniture protected, and rooms left usable at the end of each day. Premium interior grades, clean edges, and a project manager who stays reachable until final walkthrough.

heading.title: Pick your project — we handle the crew, prep, and cleanup
heading.body: Four categories cover everything Pixel Paint delivers in Central Florida: premium paint work, smart renovations, exterior care, and restore-and-list prep. Same organized teams, same project manager, zero juggling vendors.

hero.headline: A kitchen you are proud to host in — without starting from scratch
hero.body: Durable cabinet finishes for Florida humidity, updated counters and backsplash, under-cabinet lighting, and modern hardware — coordinated by Pixel Paint and Renovations so your kitchen feels new in days, not months.

sections.title: Cabinet painting that lasts
sections.body: Factory-smooth finishes in colors you will love, with expert pairing for uppers and lowers, flat black or brushed hardware, and coatings chosen to stand up to steam, grease, and daily use.

sections.title: Counters, backsplash & lighting
sections.body: One schedule for countertop replacement, backsplash install, and lighting updates — so the finished kitchen feels intentional, brighter, and ready for guests.

sections.title: Your timeline, step by step
sections.body: Walkthrough → written quote → color selection → protected prep → install coordination → final walkthrough. Most kitchen refreshes run on a focused calendar with minimal disruption to your routine.

bathroomPage.title: Bathroom Refresh | Pixel Paint Renovations
bathroomPage.description: Cost-effective bathroom refreshes with tile refinishing, wallpaper removal, and professional painting in Lake Nona and Central Florida.

hero.headline: A brighter bathroom — without weeks of demolition
hero.body: Refinish existing tile, strip dated wallpaper, retexture walls, and apply moisture-aware paint. Ideal for Orlando humidity, HOA-friendly timelines, and homeowners who want a modern look on a practical budget.

sections.title: Tile refinishing & paint
sections.body: When a full remodel is not the plan, refinishing tile and updating wall color can make a 1990s bathroom feel current — with finishes selected for moisture and everyday cleaning.

sections.title: Respectful work while you live at home
sections.body: Pathways stay open, surrounding rooms stay protected, and you know each day's schedule before crews arrive. Wallpaper removal, texture repair, and paint are sequenced to limit dust and downtime.

sections.title: What to expect
sections.body: Most bathroom refreshes finish in a few focused days depending on tile condition and wall repairs. You will know when fixtures are back in use before work starts.

blocks.label: Get a Free Quote
blocks.note: Send a few photos of your bathroom — we respond quickly.

terms.detail: XXX years from date of final payment and project sign-off.
XXX — workmanship, materials, and surfaces included in your written scope (interior paint, exterior paint, cabinet finishes, tile refresh, etc.).
XXX — normal wear and tear, owner modifications, unrelated trades, pre-existing conditions, and acts of nature.
XXX — contact Pixel Paint and Renovations at the phone or email on your contract within XXX days of noticing an issue; include photos and your contract reference.
XXX business days to acknowledge your claim; XXX to schedule inspection or repair.
XXX — whether the warranty transfers to a new homeowner if the property is sold.
XXX — any owner upkeep needed to keep coverage valid (ventilation, cleaning products, touch-up timing, etc.).

privacy.collectBody: When you submit our quote form, we collect your name, email, phone number, optional address, service interest, optional project photo, and message. We use this information only to respond to your request and provide an estimate.
privacy.useBody: We contact you about your project, schedule walkthroughs, and follow up on quotes. We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties.
privacy.formBody: Form submissions are delivered securely to our team via a third-party form service. Optional photos you upload are used solely to understand your project scope.
